title: Philips Beard Trimmer 9000 Series, Lift & Trim Pro System, Silver, Which Best Buy Winner 2023 (BT9810/13)
features: Ultimate precision with the unique steel precision technology
30 different length settings with precision steps of 0.2 mm
Sharp for life blades cut even the thickest hair without pulling
Unique skin follower guides the trimmer so that it is always the correct angle to your skin
Effortless trimming even on dense and longer beard
description: Product Description Ultimate steel precision for the perfect beard. The Philips BT9000 Prestige beard trimmer delivers unmatched precision thanks to the built-in metal comb, giving consistent trimming results no matter how much pressure is applied. Directions 1. Charge the trimmer for 1 hour for a full charge or 5 minutes for a quick trim. 2. Choose one of the 30 length settings from 0.4 to 10mm. 3. Use the precision dial to select the desired length setting. 4. Turn on the trimmer and guide it along your beard. 5. Rinse the trimmer under water for easy cleaning. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation or eye injury. Avoid use near water sources. Always unplug the trimmer when not in use. Clean and maintain according to the instructions provided. Box Contains 1 x Beard trimmer; 1 x Click-on Long beard comb; 1 x Premium storage & travel case See more
